description: This file contains the implementation of an EmailProvider that uses SendGrid's Web API v3 to send emails. It constructs the email payload, retrieves necessary configuration such as API keys and sender email, and performs HTTP POST requests to SendGrid's API endpoint.

classes.name: SendGridEmailProvider
classes.description: A class implementing the EmailProvider interface to send emails through SendGrid's Web API v3.

methods.name: SendGridEmailProvider
methods.description: Constructor that initializes the provider with configuration properties and JSON object mapper.

methods.name: send
methods.description: Method to send an email using SendGrid API. Constructs payload, authenticates via API key, and handles HTTP response.
